ddls:
CREATE TABLE "talks" (
  "talk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each talk */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the talk */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week the talk is scheduled */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the room where the talk will take place */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track the talk belongs to */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conference the talk belongs to */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Brief description or abstract of the talk */,
  "level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the talk */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the talk */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Scheduled start time of the talk */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Scheduled end time of the talk */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the talk was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the talk was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("talk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_talks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_talks_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_talks_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "room_name" TEXT /* Name of the room */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the room */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conference the room belongs to */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the room */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the room */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the room */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the room was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the room was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rooms_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the track */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conference the track belongs to */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code for the track */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "speaker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the speaker */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the speaker */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the speaker */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or company the speaker is affiliated with */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the speaker's photo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the speaker profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the speaker profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "talk_speakers" (
  "talk_speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a talk and a speaker */,
  "talk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the talk */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker giving the talk */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the speaker in the talk */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("talk_speaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_talk_speakers_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_talk_speakers_talk_id FOREIGN KEY ("talk_id") REFERENCES talks ("talk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the conference */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the conference */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the conference */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference organizer */,
  "organizer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the conference organizer */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the conference website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the conference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the conference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the attendee is registered for */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the attendee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the attendee */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or company the attendee is affiliated with */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the attendee */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the attendee's photo */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the attendee registered for the conference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attendee profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attendee profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendees_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "talk_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "talk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the talk */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of the talk */,
  "attended" INTEGER /* Whether the attendee actually attended the talk */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the attendee for the talk */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attendance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attendance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_talk_attendance_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_talk_attendance_talk_id FOREIGN KEY ("talk_id") REFERENCES talks ("talk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a role and a permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES user_permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
